---
title: "Supplementary"
author: "Jair Andrade"
date: "2026-01-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(boot)
library(dplyr)
library(flavipack)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

source("./R_scripts/cohort_utils.R")
source("./R_scripts/follow_up.R")
source("./R_scripts/NMC.R")
source("./R_scripts/plots.R")
```

# S1

```{r S1_chunk}
plot_S1()

ggsave("./plots/suppl/S1.png")
```

# S2

```{r S2_chunk, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 4}
plot_S2()

ggsave("./plots/suppl/S2.png")
```


# S3

```{r S3_chunk}
plot_S3()

ggsave("./plots/suppl/S3.png")
```

# S4

```{r S4_chunk}
plot_S4()

ggsave("./plots/suppl/S4.png")
```

# S5

```{r S5_chunk}
plot_S5()

ggsave("./plots/suppl/S5.png")
```

# S6

```{r S6_chunk}
plot_S6()

ggsave("./plots/suppl/S6.png")
```
